SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am37
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI

Class TUIView

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.View
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeListener, EventListener
public class TUIView extends View implements PropertyChangeListener
This class is the text user interface of the game.

  • Constructor Details

    • TUIView

      public TUIView(ViewState state)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      state - The state of the view.

  • Method Details

    • handleGame

      public boolean handleGame()
      This method handles all the game. it firstly asks the user if the terminal supports utf8 encoding. Then calls the preLobby method. Then prints the lobby. Then waits for all players to join. Then starts a new thread that handles the updates. Then waits for the user to press enter to request an action. Then calls the activeActions method. Then calls the choice method. If the state is SHOW_RESULTS or DISCONNECTION it prints the results or a disconnection message. finally it calls the gameOver method.
      Specified by:
      handleGame in class View
      Returns:
      true if the user wants to play again, false otherwise.

    • gameOver

      public boolean gameOver()
      This method handles the end of the game. It asks the player if he wants to play again. If the player types something different it prints an error message. If the player types 'yes' it sets the state to CREATE_JOIN and resets the client model. If the player types 'no' it returns false.
      Specified by:
      gameOver in class View
      Returns:
      true if the player wants to play again, false otherwise.

    • printLobbies

      public void printLobbies()
      This method prints the active lobbies.

    • printMyLobby

      public void printMyLobby()
      This method prints the infos of the lobby requested.

    • printAvail

      public void printAvail()
      This method prints the available resource and gold cards.

    • printTopOfGoldDeck

      public void printTopOfGoldDeck()
      This method prints the top card of the gold deck.

    • printTopOfResourceDeck

      public void printTopOfResourceDeck()
      This method prints the top card of the resource deck.

    • printStartCard

      public void printStartCard()
      This method prints the start card of the player.

    • printKingdom

      public void printKingdom()
      This method prints the token, the kingdom, the resources and the active positions in the kingdom of the player.

    • printScoreboard

      public void printScoreboard()
      This method prints the points the player and the scoreboard of the game.

    • printPlayerInfo

      public void printPlayerInfo()
      This method prints the info of the player requested. If the nickname of the player requested does not exist it prints an error message. If the nickname of the player requested exists it prints the token, the kingdom, the resources of the player requested.

    • printHand

      public void printHand()
      This method prints the hand of the player.

    • printPublicObjectives

      public void printPublicObjectives()
      This method prints the public objectives of the game.

    • printPrivateObjectives

      public void printPrivateObjectives()
      This method prints the private objectives available to the player.

    • printMyPrivateObjective

      public void printMyPrivateObjective()
      This method prints the private objective of the player.

    • printResults

      public void printResults()
      This method prints the results of the game. It prints the winner of the game and the points and the objectives completed of each player.

    • printError

      public void printError(String e)
      This method prints the error message.
      Specified by:
      printError in class View
      Parameters:
      e - The error message to print.

    • propertyChange

      public void propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent evt)
      This method is used to notify the player of a new event in the game.
      Specified by:
      propertyChange in interface PropertyChangeListener
      Parameters:
      evt - A PropertyChangeEvent object describing the event source and the property that has changed.
